features_added: Full project scaffolding from IWSDK 0.4.1
Physics-based puck: 4-substep integration, wall rebounds, mallet velocity transfer, friction, speed clamping
Air hockey table: neon surface, center line/circle, 6 split rails with goal gaps, goal zone strips, 4 table legs
Player mallet: mouse tracking via raycaster, constrained to player half
CPU mallet: AI with puck prediction, wall-bounce sim, 3 difficulty levels (speed/accuracy/aggression)
VR controller input: right grip maps to mallet, B button pause
5 game modes: Classic (first to 7), Time Attack (60s), Power-Up, Survival (3 lives), Tournament (4 rounds)
Power-up system: 5 types (Speed Boost, Shield, Magnet, Shrink, Giant) spawn on table, bob + glow animations
5 table themes: Neon Holodeck, Crimson Arena, Toxic Green, Cyberpunk, Arctic Frost — full color scheme swap
Combo system: consecutive goals build multiplier up to x5 with decay timer
16 achievements with localStorage persistence
Leaderboard: top 20, sorted, timestamped
ALL UI via PanelUI: 11 .uikitml templates, zero HTML DOM
HUD: Follower head-locked score panel (player/cpu/info)
Message toast: Follower head-locked (GOAL!, STREAK!, etc.)
Menu panels: title, mode select, difficulty, pause, game over, leaderboard, achievements, settings, help

Procedural Web Audio: mallet hit (intensity-scaled), wall bounce, goal scored (ascending arpeggio), goal conceded (descending), game start/end fanfares, power-up chime, achievement jingle, ambient drone + LFO pad
Particle effects: mallet hit sparks (color per player), wall sparks, goal explosions (15 particles), goal flash rings
Holodeck environment: neon grid floor/ceiling, 12 floating wireframe decorations (torus/box/sphere/cone), 40 ambient particles, 3 colored table lights, fog
Stats tracking: games, wins, goals, streaks, play time, power-ups collected
Settings: theme picker with prev/next, master/SFX/music volume controls
GitHub repo created, deployed to GitHub Pages

features_completed: Physics-based puck (4-substep, wall rebounds, mallet collision)
AI opponent (3 difficulties, prediction, aggression tuning)
5 game modes (Classic, Time Attack, Power-Up, Survival, Tournament)
